name: Pocket Portal
description: Local-first project portal (rooms, notes, actions, audit, artifacts)

host.label: Bind host
host.help: Bind the Pocket Portal HTTP server (LAN IP recommended for iPhone-on-WiFi use).

allowLan.label: Allow LAN
allowLan.help: If false, refuses non-loopback connections even if bound to LAN.

dataFile.label: Data file
dataFile.help: Supports state: relative paths (stored under plugin stateDir).
